creator: me@falz.net
text:
On Wed, May 18, 2011 at 7:02 AM, Sylvio Cesar Teixeira
<sylvio@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Why is necessary to add a "rrdcached" ?

Using `rrdcached` is optional. The port already installs it but does
not include a startup script, hence the patch. It is useful for those
that use it to have a standard startup script without rolling their
own.

--Chris
